revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-1-045

A structure with a wood or concrete deck supported on piles extending over open water to provide a landing place where the depth of water would otherwise be prohibitive.

{{IALAFooter}}
